inline_comments: Store active bus handles per account
Store metrics snapshots per account (for status reporting)
Get the default account's bus and send approval message
Track bus handle for metrics callback
Log significant metrics at appropriate levels
Get metrics snapshot for a Nostr account. Returns undefined if account is not running.
Get all active Nostr bus handles. Useful for debugging and status reporting.

Publish a profile (kind:0) for a Nostr account. @param accountId - Account ID (defaults to "default") @param profile - Profile data to publish @returns Publish results with successes and failures @throws Error if account is not running
Get profile publish state for a Nostr account. @param accountId - Account ID (defaults to "default") @returns Profile publish state or null if account not running

functions.name: getNostrMetrics
functions.doc: Get metrics snapshot for a Nostr account.   Returns undefined if account is not running.

functions.name: getActiveNostrBuses
functions.doc: Get all active Nostr bus handles.   Useful for debugging and status reporting.

functions.name: publishNostrProfile
functions.doc: Publish a profile (kind:0) for a Nostr account.    accountId - Account ID (defaults to "default")    profile - Profile d

functions.name: getNostrProfileState
functions.doc: Get profile publish state for a Nostr account.    accountId - Account ID (defaults to "default")    Profile publish stat
